title: More Mob Drops (Datapack)
description: A Mod that adds in more mob drops to mobs that don't drop anything upon death. (Datapack Version)
body:
This data pack adds more mob drops to mobs and creatures that don't drop anything upon death.

If you want to use this data pack in your server or use it for youtube, the only thing you have to do is credit my data pack by putting this data pack link into your youtube video description and if you have a server with some data packs then credit my data pack somewhere in your server.

Have fun using my mod!
